title: Tangy Fluffy Festive Baked Beans Stir-fry
description: A tangy and fluffy Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring low-calorie-friendly baked beans combined with aromatic vegetables in a flavorful sauce.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, mash the garlic cloves with a fork.
Add onions, olive oil, and red pepper flakes to the mashed garlic. Mix well until evenly coated.
Drain and rinse the baked beans in cold water. Spread them out on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Arrange tomatoes around the baked beans on the baking tray, placing them in a circular pattern if possible for even cooking.
Add thyme sprigs over the top of the mixture and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Drizzle olive oil evenly over the entire surface. Bake for 20 minutes.
After 20 minutes, remove from oven and mix all ingredients together in a single layer using a spatula or spoon.
Bake again for an additional 10-15 minutes until vegetables are tender and lightly browned on top.
Allow to cool slightly before serving as a snack or side dish with a sprinkle of fresh herbs if desired.
